nasb.text: And in all the vineyards there is wailing, Because I will pass through the midst of you,” says the Lord.

esv.text: and in all vineyards there shall be wailing, for I will pass through your midst,” says the Lord.

cnv.text: 所有葡萄園充滿哀慟的聲音， 因為我必在你們中間經過。” 這是耶和華說的。

ccb.text: 每个葡萄园都传出哀恸的声音， 因为我要从你们中间经过，惩罚你们。 这是耶和华说的。”
